field.name: ma_dvcs
field.check: ma_dvcs not in (select ma_dvcs from dmdvcs where status = '1')⩓not exists(select 1 from dmkho b where @@table.ma_kho = b.ma_kho) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 1)⩓exists(select 1 from dmkho b where @@table.ma_kho = b.ma_kho) and @@table.ma_dvcs not in (select distinct ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and r_edit = 1)

field.name: ma_nh
field.check: (@siteMethod = 1 and ma_nh = '') or (ma_nh <> '' and ma_nh not in (select rtrim(ma_nh) from dmnhkho where status = '1'))

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Site', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @siteGroupConflict nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @r int, @siteMethod varchar(1) -- Site Group select @siteMethod = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_gia_nh_kho' select @siteMethod = isnull(@siteMethod, '0') select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có hoặc lồng nhau.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @siteGroupConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Nhóm kho tại ô %invalidCell đã khai báo trên đơn vị khác, không cập nhật được.' else N'Cannot update the site group %invalidCell. It has already been used by another unit.' end create index i on @@table (ma_kho) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho -- Checking &Checking; select @field = 'ma_kho', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kho like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select @field = 'ma_nh', @r = min(stt) from @@table a join dmkho b with(nolock) on a.ma_nh <> '' and a.ma_nh = rtrim(b.ma_nh) and a.ma_dvcs <> b.ma_dvcs&SiteGroupConflict; -- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho delete @@table where ma_kho in (select ma_kho from #k) select identity(int, 1, 1) as stt, ma_dvcs, ma_kho, ten_kho, ten_kho2, dai_ly_yn, ma_nh into #k1 from @@table -- Checking select @field = 'ma_kho' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_kho <> b.ma_kho and a.ma_kho like rtrim(b.ma_kho) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmkho b with (index(PK_dmkho)) where a.ma_kho like rtrim(b.ma_kho) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmkho a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_kho like rtrim(b.ma_kho) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; if @@admin = 0 begin if @type = '1' begin select @r = min(a.stt), @field = 'ma_dvcs' from #k a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho where &Permissions; &Error; end end -- Insert declare @max int select @max = isnull(max(id), 0) from dmkho &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
